en: Bel bows down; Nebo stoops; their idols are on beasts and livestock; these things you carry are borne as burdens on weary beasts.
zh: 彼勒俯伏，尼波彎腰； 巴比倫人的偶像馱在走獸和牲口上。 你們所抬的現在都成了重擔， 成了疲乏的牲畜身上的重負。

en: They stoop; they bow down together; they cannot save the burden, but themselves go into captivity.
zh: 它們一同彎腰、俯伏， 不能保護重負， 它們自己反倒被擄去了。

en: "Listen to me, O house of Jacob, all the remnant of the house of Israel, who have been borne by me from before your birth, carried from the womb;
zh: “雅各家啊，以色列家所有餘剩的人哪！ 你們都要聽我的話， 你們自出母腹，就蒙我懷抱； 自出母胎，就蒙我提攜。

en: even to your old age I am he, and to gray hairs I will carry you. I have made, and I will bear; I will carry and will save.
zh: 直到你們年老，我還是一樣； 直到你們髮白，我仍然懷抱你。 我以前既然這樣作了，以後我仍必提攜你； 我必懷抱你，也必拯救你。

en: "To whom will you liken me and make me equal, and compare me, that we may be alike?
zh: 你們要把誰與我相比，誰與我相似呢？ 你們把誰與我比較，好使我們同等呢？

en: Those who lavish gold from the purse, and weigh out silver in the scales, hire a goldsmith, and he makes it into a god; then they fall down and worship!
zh: 那些從錢袋倒出金子， 用天平稱銀子的人， 雇用金匠製造神像； 他們向神像又俯伏又叩拜。

en: They lift it to their shoulders, they carry it, they set it in its place, and it stands there; it cannot move from its place. If one cries to it, it does not answer or save him from his trouble.
zh: 他們把神像抬起來，扛在肩頭上， 然後把它安置在固定的地方，它就立在那裡， 總不離開它的本位。 雖然有人向它呼求，它也不能回答； 它也不能救人脫離患難。

en: "Remember this and stand firm, recall it to mind, you transgressors,
zh: “你們當記念這事，要堅定不移； 悖逆的人哪！你們要留心思想。

en: remember the former things of old; for I am God, and there is no other; I am God, and there is none like me,
zh: 你們當記念上古以前的事， 因為我是 神，再沒有別的神； 我是 神，沒有神像我。

en: declaring the end from the beginning and from ancient times things not yet done, saying, 'My counsel shall stand, and I will accomplish all my purpose,'
zh: 我從起初就宣告末後的事， 從古時就述說還未作成的事， 說：‘我的計劃必定成功， 我所喜悅的，我都必作成。’

en: calling a bird of prey from the east, the man of my counsel from a far country. I have spoken, and I will bring it to pass; I have purposed, and I will do it.
zh: 我把鷙鳥從日出之地召來， 就是把成就我計劃的人從遠方召來。 我不但說了，而且也要使我的話實現； 我不但計劃好了，而且也必實行。

en: "Listen to me, you stubborn of heart, you who are far from righteousness:
zh: 心裡頑固的人哪！ 遠離公義的人哪！你們要聽我。

en: I bring near my righteousness; it is not far off, and my salvation will not delay; I will put salvation in Zion, for Israel my glory."
zh: 我使我的公義臨近了，必不遠離； 我的救恩必不遲延。 我要為以色列，我的榮耀， 在錫安施行拯救。”
